---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description
A clear description of what you'd like to see added.

## Problem It Solves
What problem does this feature solve? How would it improve trupositive?

## Proposed Solution
How do you envision this working?

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches could solve this problem?

## Use Case
Describe a specific scenario where you'd use this feature.

## Willingness to Contribute
- [ ] I'd be willing to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I'd be willing to help test this feature
- [ ] I'd like to discuss the approach first

## Additional Context
Any other context, examples, or screenshots about the feature request.
